features.label: Search / Filter
features.desc: Search any key or value in the tree. Matching nodes highlight, non-matching fade.
features.howto: Type in search box in Tree tab toolbar

features.label: JSONPath Copy
features.desc: Click any key in the tree to copy its full JSONPath (e.g. $.user.address.city).
features.howto: Click any key name in tree

features.label: JSON Schema Generator
features.desc: Auto-generates a JSON Schema (draft-07) from parsed JSON.

features.label: Diff Mode
features.desc: Paste two JSONs side by side. Differences shown as ADDED/REMOVED/CHANGED.

features.label: Edit Mode
features.desc: Toggle edit mode to modify values directly in the tree.

features.label: JSON → CSV
features.desc: Converts array of objects to CSV and downloads it.

features.label: Sort Keys
features.desc: Recursively sorts all object keys alphabetically.

features.label: Flatten / Unflatten
features.desc: Flatten nested JSON to dot-notation keys. Unflatten converts back.

features.label: Size Info
features.desc: Shows file size (KB), node count, and validation status in real time.

features.label: Line Numbers
features.desc: Textarea now shows line numbers that sync with scroll position.

features.label: Real-time Validation
features.desc: Green border = valid JSON, red border = invalid. Updates as you type.

features.label: Syntax Theme Toggle
features.desc: Switch between dark and light syntax color themes.

features.label: Bookmark Nodes
features.desc: Star any node in the tree to bookmark it. Gold left border for quick identification.
